certifications.name: IBM Certified Associate Developer — Quantum Computation using Qiskit
certifications.description: Formal IBM certification validating ability to use Qiskit to create and execute quantum computing programs on IBM Quantum computers.

certifications.name: Foundations of Quantum Error Correction
certifications.description: Advanced credential covering quantum error correction principles including the Shor code and advanced code families.

certifications.name: Deep Learning Specialization
certifications.description: Comprehensive deep learning specialization covering neural architectures, CNNs, RNNs, Transformers, and practical ML workflows.

certifications.name: AWS Knowledge: Amazon Braket Training Badge
certifications.description: AWS credential focused on Amazon Braket and cloud-based quantum computing workflows.

badges.name: Qiskit Advocate
badges.description: Recognition for deep Qiskit knowledge and active contribution to the quantum community.

badges.name: Qiskit Advocate Mentorship Program 2025 Contributor
badges.description: Recognition for active contribution to QAMP 2025 including collaborative quantum research and delivery.

badges.name: 2025 Qiskit Fall Fest Mentor
badges.description: Recognition for mentoring participants and supporting an official Qiskit Fall Fest event.

badges.name: IBM Quantum Challenge 2024 Achievement
badges.description: Hands-on achievement using Qiskit 1.0 and utility-scale quantum workflow concepts.

awards.name: Deep Tech Canada NRC Student Award
awards.organization: Deep Tech Canada / National Research Council Canada
awards.description: Award recognizing contributions to resource-efficient quantum kernel research at Quantum Days 2024.

awards.name: NRC Inventor Fixed Milestone Award
awards.description: Award recognizing progress in patent-driven quantum machine learning research.

awards.name: Mitacs Globalink Research Award
awards.description: Competitive research award supporting international collaboration in quantum machine learning.

awards.name: Mitacs Business Strategy Internship
awards.description: Program bridging deep-tech QML research and commercialization strategy.

awards.name: Second Best Poster
awards.description: Award for research communication quality at uOttawa's centennial quantum science workshop.
